title: Commercial Quantum Systems: Market Overview
description: Survey the landscape of commercially available quantum computers from leading vendors. Compare specifications, access models, pricing, and use cases for IBM, Google, IonQ, Rigetti, Quantinuum, and emerging players.
learningObjectives: Identify major quantum computing vendors and their technology approaches
Compare specifications and capabilities of leading commercial systems
Understand different access models (cloud, on-premise, dedicated)
Evaluate pricing structures and total cost of quantum computing
Match commercial systems to application requirements
